calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Brendan Casey is present.
Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Michael Martzke is present.
Howard Slavitt representing the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 640 Masonic Avenue, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of May 18, 2009 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk Nancy Regas, Not Reported. (218)
